name: VeilVault Guardian
description: An autonomous AI guardian that monetizes your private data without exposing it. Stores credentials on Base, listens for incoming queries, generates ZK proofs, and auto-routes USDC earnings. No human required per query cycle. VeilVault pairs ERC-8004 agent identity with encrypted on-chain credential storage — agents earn trust through verifiable identity, then use that identity to gate access to their operational secrets.

erc8004Identity._registryNote: contractAddress is the ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry on Base Sepolia (source: github.com/erc-8004/erc-8004-contracts). tokenId and registrationTx will be populated after running: GUARDIAN_PRIVATE_KEY=0x... npm run register-erc8004

registriesUsed.purpose: Guardian agent identity registration — establishes verifiable on-chain agent persona
registriesUsed.interaction: registerAgent() on startup, used to gate credential storage access

erc8004Identity.erc8004Role: VeilVault is the credential layer above identity infrastructure — trusted agents (verified via IdentityRegistry) use that identity to gate access to their operational secrets stored in VeilVault

autonomousCapabilities.humanInterventionRequired: Only for initial credential storage and manual withdrawal trigger

_deployNote: Cloudflare Quick Tunnel — active while Cerebro (Amantu's Mac) is running. Hosted from local standalone Next.js build. Upgrade to Railway/Cloudflare Pages with git push after PAT rotation.
